title: Correct the migration contract and portable verification guidance
description: Correct the migration contract and portable verification guidance
acceptance_criteria: The canonical hook contract matches the existing marker-based whole-file install and removal behavior without promising partial-content preservation; Claude

and Gemini correctly preserve full SpecSync input; documentation changes under docs require the SDD lifecycle; the native smoke command is cross-platform; Fledge verification and strict SpecSync 100% coverage pass.
